response.title: Senior Manufacturing Engineer
response.description: Join Precision Manufacturing Inc. as a Senior Manufacturing Engineer where you will lead engineering projects aimed at optimizing production processes, enhancing product quality, and driving efficiency across our manufacturing operations. In this role, you will work closely with cross-functional teams to implement innovative solutions that align with our strategic goals and ensure operational excellence.

required_skills: Six Sigma certification (Green Belt or higher)
Advanced proficiency in CAD software (AutoCAD, SolidWorks)
Experience with CNC programming and operations
Data analysis and statistical process control (SPC)
Project management experience using tools like MS Project or similar
Strong understanding of manufacturing automation technologies
preferred_skills: Knowledge of safety regulations and compliance standards in manufacturing
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, or related field; Master’s degree preferred
